name: Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach the rotor slicer/shredder using a thin slicer cone (No 4).
2. Turn to speed 4 and slice the cabbage into a large bowl.
3. Switch to the coarse shredder cone (no 2) and turn to speed 4, then shred the carrots and green pepper into the same bowl.
4. Add the mayonnaise, vinegar, sugar, salt, pepper, and milk to the bowl. Thoroughly combine all ingredients by hand.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least three hours before serving.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings
